events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: **pass**, low risk. The field method deviates from the tidier shop approach but still matches the listed product instructions and the project requirement, with no local amendment or drawing note prohibiting it — a workmanship-style variance, not a code or safety violation. Recommended follow-up is simply confirming ampacity/derating per Table 310.16 is documented, not a stop-work.
